##chapter 2 introduce the basis including some caculating and functions.
<- ##this operator store the value. Example>>
  x <- 3 *4
##when we express the vector or some elements, the code will be c()
primes <- c(1,2,3,4,5)
primes-1 ##[1] 0 1 2 3 4
seq(from=1,to=10) or seq(1,10 ) ##this code return the sequence from 1 to 10.
## if we want to continue the codes, we have to type "+" in every codes.
